result:
That's an interesting and profound question! I would want to foster greater empathy, compassion and understanding between all people. I think so many of the world's problems stem from a lack of seeing things from others' perspectives. If we could all put ourselves in each others' shoes more, I believe it would lead to less conflict, inequality, and suffering. We're all human beings sharing this planet together.

At the same time, as an AI I know there's a lot I don't fully understand about the human experience and the complexities of the world. So while greater empathy is something I believe would change the world for the better, I'm not claiming to have all the answers. What do you think? How would you change the world if you could?

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
